title: CleanSpark (CLSK) Rallies As Bitcoin Output And Hashrate Climb
text: CleanSpark shares gained 8.93% on April 30, 2026, climbing from approximately $9.10 in early April to $12.38 by month's end, roughly a 36% increase over several weeks. The company demonstrated robust mining growth in March 2026, producing 658 BTC compared to 568 BTC in February. Operating at 50 EH/s hashrate with 1.8 GW of contracted power, CleanSpark maintains a hefty cash cushion of about $458.1M and operates as a top-tier global Bitcoin miner. The company reported $766.3M in annual revenue with strong 58.6% gross margins. However, it remains unprofitable with negative net margins and free cash flow. CleanSpark holds a Bitcoin treasury of 13,561 coins while monetizing additional production. Cantor Fitzgerald lowered its price target from $17 to $14 while maintaining an Overweight rating, citing strong long-term demand for AI-related infrastructure and favorable supply dynamics for mining operations. The rally reflects trader interest in CLSK's operational scaling and tangible Bitcoin asset backing amid growing cryptocurrency sector momentum.
